2001 की जनगणना के अनुसार, शहरी और ग्रामीण क्षेत्रों में वर्गीकृत, औसत परिवार के आकार और कुल परिवारों की संख्या का राज्यवार विवरण प्रदान करें।

predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    state, 
    CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, 
    AVG(household_member_count) AS average_household_size, 
    COUNT(household_id) AS total_households
FROM 
    fact_household_composition
JOIN 
    dim_geography ON fact_household_composition.geography_id = dim_geography.geography_id
GROUP BY 
    state, 
    CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG
ORDER BY 
    state, 
    CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG;

    state,

SELECT 
    dg.state, 
    AVG(fhc.household_member_count) AS avg_household_members, 
    SUM(fhc.household_married_women_count) AS total_married_women
FROM 
    fact_household_composition fhc
JOIN 
    dim_household_socioeconomic dhs ON fhc.socioeconomic_id = dhs.socioeconomic_id
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id
WHERE 
    dhs.household_assets_index = (SELECT MAX(household_assets_index) FROM dim_household_socioeconomic)

    dg.state
ORDER BY

question: गरीबी रेखा से ऊपर के परिवारों के लिए, राज्य और शहरी-ग्रामीण वर्गीकरण के अनुसार, औसत मासिक प्रति व्यक्ति खपत और कुल परिवारों की संख्या प्रदान करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag, 
    AVG(fhp.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_consumption_per_capita, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT fhp.household_id) AS total_households
FROM 
    fact_household_poverty_metrics fhp
JOIN 
    fact_household_composition fhc ON fhp.household_id = fhc.household_id
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id
WHERE 
    fhp.below_poverty_line_indicator = 'No'
GROUP BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag
ORDER BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag, 
    AVG(fhp.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_consumption_per_capita, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT fhp.household_id) AS total_households
FROM 
    fact_household_poverty_metrics fhp
JOIN 
    fact_household_composition fhc ON fhp.household_id = fhc.household_id
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id
WHERE 
    fhp.below_poverty_line_indicator = 'No'
GROUP BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag
ORDER BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag;

उन ग्रामीण जिलों और उनके राज्यों की पहचान करें जहां औसत मासिक प्रति व्यक्ति खपत 996 से कम है, और उन्हें 0 से 14 वर्ष की आयु के बच्चों की कुल संख्या के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध किया गया हो।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) < 996 ORDER BY SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography.district, dim_geography.state 
FROM fact_household_poverty_metrics 
JOIN fact_household_composition ON fact_household_poverty_metrics.household_id = fact_household_composition.household_id 
JOIN dim_geography ON fact_household_composition.geography_id = dim_geography.geography_id 
WHERE dim_geography.census_2001_urban_rural_flag = 'Rural' AND fact_household_poverty_metrics.monthly_consumption_per_capita < 996 
ORDER BY fact_household_composition.household_children_0_to_14_count;

FROM fact_household_poverty_metrics 
JOIN fact_household_composition ON fact_household_poverty_metrics.household_id = fact_household_composition.household_id

WHERE dim_geography.census_2001_urban_rural_flag = 'Rural' AND fact_household_poverty_metrics.monthly_consumption_per_capita < 996 
ORDER BY fact_household_composition.household_children_0_to_14_count;

question:

SELECT DISTINCT dim_geography.district 
FROM dim_geography 
JOIN fact_household_composition 
ON dim_geography.geography_id = fact_household_composition.geography_id

ON fact_household_composition.survey_methodology_id = dim_survey_methodology.survey_methodology_id 
WHERE dim_geography.census_2001_urban_rural_flag ILIKE 'urban' 
OR dim_survey_methodology.is_reinterview_household ILIKE 'yes';
raw_output:

JOIN fact_household_composition 
ON dim_geography.geography_id = fact_household_composition.geography_id

predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography.state, AVG(fact_household_poverty_metrics.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_consumption 
FROM fact_household_poverty_metrics 
JOIN fact_household_composition ON fact_household_poverty_metrics.household_id = fact_household_composition.household_id 
JOIN dim_geography ON fact_household_composition.geography_id = dim_geography.geography_id 
WHERE fact_household_poverty_metrics.below_poverty_line_indicator = 'No' 
GROUP BY dim_geography.state 
ORDER BY average_monthly_consumption DESC;
raw_output:

predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag, 
    AVG(fhp.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_consumption_per_capita, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT fhp.household_id) AS total_household_count
FROM 
    fact_household_poverty_metrics fhp
JOIN 
    fact_household_composition fhc ON fhp.household_id = fhc.household_id
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id

    fhp.below_poverty_line_indicator = 'No'
GROUP BY 
    dg.state,
